stan_swiata.temat: Konflikt USA-Iran / Zamknięcie Cieśniny Ormuz / Groźba Kharg Island
stan_swiata.opis: Second consecutive day of mutual US-Iran strikes; Hormuz closed; Trump reiterates Kharg Island threat — escalation continues at elevated level, energy price risk for Poland remains real.
US inflation elevated, Trump indifferent — indirect risk to Polish economy via global financial conditions, continuing to decay.
Conflict ongoing on Poland's eastern border with no qualitative change — deep background.
Iran's nuclear programme slightly more salient given active US-Iran war, but no new IAEA development this cycle.
Xi Jinping in Pyongyang to revitalise ties — strategic shift with indirect NATO/Poland relevance, no new development, deep background.
Israeli strikes in southern Lebanon (17 killed) and Gaza ongoing — deep background, minimal direct impact on Poland.
